zh.Diksmuide, Flandre occidentale, Belgique: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫迪可斯姆德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Diederik II VAN BEVEREN於1152年出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫迪可斯姆德時，他的父親Dirk III van Amstel Beveren22歲，母親Elisabeth19歲。他於大約1188年與Ade de Coucy在法國皮卡迪索姆波福斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫迪可斯姆德被列為burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren。他去世於1203年4月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diederik II VAN BEVEREN于1152年出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫迪可斯姆德时，他的父亲Dirk III van Amstel Beveren22岁，母亲Elisabeth19岁。他于大约1188年与Ade de Coucy在法国皮卡迪索姆波福斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫迪可斯姆德被列为burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren。他去世于1203年4月之后。

nameMeanings.name: VAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Diederik II VAN BEVEREN was born in 1152, in Diksmuide, West Flanders, Belgium, his father, Dirk III van Amstel Beveren, was 22 and his mother, Elisabeth, was 19. He married Ade de Coucy about 1188, in Boves, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren in Diksmuide, West Flanders, Belgium. He died after April 1203.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diederik II VAN BEVEREN est né en 1152, à Diksmuide, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Dirk III van Amstel Beveren, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ade de Coucy environ 1188, à Boves, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren à Diksmuide, Flandre occidentale, Belgique. Il est décédé après avril 1203.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diederik II VAN BEVEREN 1152 in Diksmuide, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dirk III van Amstel Beveren 22 und seine Mutter Elisabeth 19. Er hat um 1188 in Boves, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Ade de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren in Diksmuide, West-Flandern, Belgien aufgeführt. Er starb nach April 1203.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diederik II VAN BEVEREN è nato il nel 1152 nel Diksmuide, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, il suo padre, Dirk III van Amstel Beveren, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ade de Coucy circa 1188, nel Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren nel Diksmuide, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio. Morì dopo il aprile 1203.

ja.Beveren, Beveren-Waas, East Flanders, Be: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンベバーエン-ワアス
ja.Boves, Somme, France: フランスピカーディソンメボベス
ja.Beveren-Waas, Flandre-Orientale, Belgiqu: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンベバーエン-ワアス
ja.Diksmuide, Flandre occidentale, Belgique: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンディクスムイド
ja.lifeSummary: Diederik II VAN BEVERENが1152年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンディクスムイドで生まれた時，父Dirk III van Amstel Beverenは22歳，母Elisabethは19歳であった。約1188年にフランスピカーディソンメボベスでAde de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンディクスムイドでの職業はburggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beverenと記録されている。彼は1203年4月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Diederik II VAN BEVEREN(이)가 1152년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 다이크스무이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dirk III van Amstel Beveren(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1188년 프랑스 피카디 솜 보브스에서 Ade de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 다이크스무이드에서 burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren이었다. 그는 1203년 4월 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diederik II VAN BEVEREN nasceu em 1152, em Diksmuide, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Dirk III van Amstel Beveren, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ade de Coucy aproximadamente 1188, em Boves, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren em Diksmuide, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica. Ele faleceu após abril de 1203.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diederik II VAN BEVEREN родился в 1152 г. в местности диксмуид, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Dirk III van Amstel Beveren было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ade de Coucy около 1188 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren в местности диксмуид, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия. Он умер после апрель 1203 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diederik II VAN BEVEREN nació en 1152, en Diksmuide, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Dirk III van Amstel Beveren, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elisabeth, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ade de Coucy aproximadamente 1188, en Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era burggraaf - châtelain de dixmude. heer van beveren en Diksmuide, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica. Murió después de abril de 1203.
